creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your ramen cravings this winter! 😋

📍Daikan, JLT and DIFC
🍜 Chef’s Special: rich broth, toppings overload

📍Kinoya, The Greens (Michelin Bib Gourmand)
🍜 Spicy Miso Ramen: perfect balance of flavors and textures

📍Yui, D3
🍜 Tantanmen: creamy with a good kick of spice, fresh handmade noodles

📍Reif, Dar Wasl Mall and Time Out Market (Michelin Bib Gourmand)
🍜 Tantanmen: Thick and savory broth with delish wagyu beef skewer

📍Tomo, Raffles Hotel
🍜 Pork Ramen: delicate flavors, roasted pork slices, great terrace views 

📍Maxzi, Al Quoz
🍜Torikotsu miso ramen: best veal char siew we’ve ever tasted

📍MaKiRa, Dusit Thani
🍜 Contemporary flavors, unique fusion (Tom Yum Ramen)

💵 Approximate bill for 2 in all restaurants listed above: 150-200 AED

Tag your foodie besties!

transcription.text: I'm talkin', I'm talkin', I'm talkin' All around the clock, I'm talkin' Hold my body now, I'm talkin' Opposite of soft, I'm talkin' Wild, wild thoughts, you gotta keep up with me I got some young energy, I got the L-O-V-E How do you do it for me?
